# Declarative Management

**Web Service Endpoint**

Enable your server to support declarative management or trigger a declarative management synchronization operation on the device.

## Discussion

The server uses this command to turn on the declarative management engine on the device the first time the server sends it. Subsequent commands trigger a declarative management synchronization operation.

### Command availability



### Example request and response



## Commands and responses

- **DeclarativeManagementCommand**: The command to enable your server to support declarative management or trigger a declarative management synchronization operation on the device.
- **DeclarativeManagementResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to enable your server to support declarative management or trigger a declarative management synchronization operation on the device.
